song.title: The Love Only Found in the Lord
song.author: Hannah Miller
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C B
song.lyrics: [V1] .D Bm G A I’d been yearning for something other .D Bm G A Than my life’s success each day. .D Bm G A Dreams of living better than others .D Bm G A Wasted life, so now I pray. [C] .D G A Lord, I give my whole life to You. .D G A Lord, I want You more each day. .D G A Now I know what I’ve been needing, . D Bm G A D It’s been here, forever, |the love only found in the Lord. [V2] Turning’s hard, but I’m getting better Singing, praying, reading each day. Learning what’s my purpose for living, I can talk with Him and say: [V3] Once a sinner, now a believer, I am proud to say I’m saved, I want God in my life forever, Loving Him from day to day. [B] .D Bm G A D Bm The love only found in the Lord… . G A D Forever, the love in the Lord… . G A D The greatest thing ever the Lord.
